hero.title: Reliable help for everyday home problems

about.title: About FixItNow

profile.ready: Your profile is ready to use.
advertise.title: Advertise with Us

reviews.title: Reviews
guide.book.title: Book a service
guide.book.subtitle: Pick a category, choose a service, and submit your request in minutes.
guide.menu.title: Open the menu (mobile)
guide.menu.subtitle: On your phone, tap the menu icon to reach Help, My Bookings, and more.
guide.bookings.title: My Bookings
guide.bookings.subtitle: Track every request — pending, approved, in progress, and completed.
guide.complete.title: Complete & rate
guide.complete.subtitle: When work is done, rate your worker and tap Mark as Done to finish.
guide.worker.jobs.title: Available jobs
guide.worker.jobs.subtitle: Browse open bookings, pay commission, and claim jobs that match your trade.
guide.worker.myjobs.title: My Jobs
guide.worker.myjobs.subtitle: Track assigned work and claim-pending jobs awaiting admin approval.
guide.worker.profile.title: Complete your profile
guide.worker.profile.subtitle: Add your trade, CNIC, and location so customers can find you.
guide.worker.dashboard.title: Worker dashboard
guide.worker.dashboard.subtitle: Open your dashboard from the menu to see available jobs and your active work.
guide.worker.claim.title: Claim jobs
guide.worker.claim.subtitle: Browse approved jobs near you, check customer name and location, then tap Claim Job.
guide.worker.done.title: Mark jobs done
guide.worker.done.subtitle: When work is finished, mark the job done from My Jobs. Guest bookings complete with your confirmation only.
guide.worker.alerts.title: Live alerts
guide.worker.alerts.subtitle: You will get live notifications for new jobs, customer updates, and completed bookings.
